src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone dramatic changes, with scenes that would have surpassed even the imagination of the best screenwriters. In last year’s annual report, I noted that the financial markets in 2017 performed in a manner that was “pleasantly surprising,” while also highlighting the “hidden concerns” for the outlook. Looking back at 2018, it could perhaps be described as a year of “joy followed by sorrow.” Multiple global stock indices reached historic highs in January, but the heated investment sentiment was soon met with the cold front of Sino-US trade friction. Coupled with the protracted Brexit negotiations, deteriorating geopolitics, and four interest rate hikes by the US Federal Reserve, market optimism reversed sharply, leading to significant declines in asset prices over the year. The MSCI World Index fell by as much as 20.3% from its peak to trough, ending the year down about 10%—its worst performance since the 2008 global financial crisis. The Hang Seng Index dropped as much as 26.7% from its high, closing the year down 13.6%, marking its largest annual decline in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite volatile and unpredictable external conditions, Hong Kong’s financial system remained robust, with smooth and uninterrupted operation of the money markets. The Linked Exchange Rate System, in place for thirty-five years, successfully withstood the test of capital outflows from the Hong Kong dollar. Since the outbreak of the global financial crisis, approximately HKD 1 trillion equivalent has flowed into the Hong Kong dollar. Last year, as US interest rates rose and the interest rate spread between Hong Kong and the US continued to widen, carry trades involving “selling Hong Kong dollars and buying US dollars” increased. The Hong Kong dollar weakened against the US dollar at the beginning of the year, and the “weak-side Convertibility Undertaking” established in 2005 was triggered for the first time in April, and subsequently triggered 26 more times during the year. In accordance with established mechanisms, the HKMA fulfilled its “buy Hong Kong dollars, sell US dollars” weak-side Convertibility Undertaking, orderly and transparently absorbing HKD 103.5 billion in selling orders for the Hong Kong dollar in the market. As funds flowed out, the one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rate rose by 105 basis points over 2018, and banks also raised their prime rates following the US rate hike in September. The HKMA repeatedly and in a timely manner explained the operation of the “weak-side Convertibility Undertaking” to the public through various channels, helping the public understand that capital outflows from the Hong Kong dollar are an inevitable part of the normalization of Hong Kong’s interest rates and a normal operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System. At the end of last year, the International Monetary Fund reiterated its support for Hong Kong’s Linked Exchange Rate System, and the Hong Kong SAR Government also emphasized that the Linked Exchange Rate is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary stability. All these have helped to stabilize public confidence in the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The 2008 global financial crisis exposed various malpractices and hidden dangers in the global financial system, prompting the international community to coordinate a series of reforms over the past decade targeting financial markets and institutions, including enhancements in corporate governance and risk management in banking supervision. The HKMA’s banking supervision work focuses on two key areas: first, prudential supervision of banks’ assets and liabilities risk; and second, banks’ conduct—both are indispensable. In terms of asset and liability risk supervision, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board under the G20, the HKMA has the responsibility to fully implement international regulatory standards to ensure that Hong Kong’s banking sector operates in a sound and prudent manner. At the end of last year, the capital adequacy ratio of Hong Kong banks reached 20.3%, not only far above the international minimum requirement of 8%, but also significantly higher than the 14.7% level during the global financial crisis. The average liquidity coverage ratio of major banks reached 167.6% in the fourth quarter, again well above the statutory minimum of 90%. At the same time, to avoid repeating the use of public funds to rescue “too big to fail” financial institutions as seen during the global financial crisis, the Financial Stability Board has established international standards for resolution mechanisms for financial institutions. Hong Kong is one of the few jurisdictions in Asia to have fully implemented these requirements. The HKMA’s Resolution Office is implementing the operational details of this mechanism, requiring banks to undertake structural changes to ensure that resolution plans can be effectively executed when needed. Last year, the "Rules on Loss-Absorbing Capacity" were introduced, and more related rules will be rolled out in the future.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Given the continued rise in property prices, the HKMA has taken pre-emptive measures, introducing eight rounds of countercyclical measures between 2009 and 2017 to ensure that, should the property market reverse, Hong Kong’s banking system has sufficient shock resistance to withstand the impact. These measures have proven effective: the average loan-to-value ratio for new residential mortgages fell from 64% in 2009 to 46% at the end of 2018; the average debt-to-income ratio also dropped from 41% in 2010 to 34% at the end of 2018. During the year, bank credit recorded moderate growth of 4.4%, overall asset quality remained sound, and the non-performing loan ratio for retail banks further declined to 0.5%, well below both international and local historical averages. Last year, the banking sector’s profitability continued to grow, with overall return on equity rising for the second consecutive year to 13%. Several international banking groups delivered strong results in their Hong Kong operations, making them important pillars of group profitability.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: In terms of regulating banks’ conduct, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) established the Conduct Department in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers by banks and to strengthen consumer protection. To address both symptoms and root causes, in addition to setting various regulatory requirements targeting the fundamental conduct of banks’ operations, in recent years we have vigorously promoted reforms in bank culture. We encourage banks to foster a sound culture through governance, incentive systems, and evaluation and feedback mechanisms, striving to ensure a top-down effect within banks, thereby fundamentally restoring and enhancing customers’ trust and respect for banks. Following the issuance of concrete guidelines to all banks in Hong Kong in 2017, the HKMA further introduced supervisory measures on bank culture at the end of 2018, including requiring banks to conduct self-assessments on their corporate culture and the implementation of related measures, so that the three pillars of a sound banking culture can be effectively executed.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Although the internet and mobile finance are global trends, the HKMA continued last year to promote financial inclusion, catering to communities unable to adopt new technologies. For example, together with the Hong Kong Association of Banks, we promoted the launch of the “Easy Pay” cash withdrawal service for the elderly at convenience stores without the need for purchase, with the network of participating stores now exceeding 300. We also liaised with Hongkong Post to introduce the Easy Withdrawal Service for the elderly at seven post offices, mainly located on outlying islands and in the New Territories. In response to the HKMA’s recommendations, the banking sector actively increased barrier-free facilities during the year, providing inclusive banking services for people with disabilities. One example is the number of ATMs equipped with voice navigation, which increased more than tenfold in a year to over 700 units. In addition, with the HKMA’s active promotion, we expect that more physical branches and mobile banking services will be established in remote areas, making banking more convenient for the public.

terms: {'交易量': 'transaction number', '共用二維碼': 'Common QR Code', '快速支付系統': 'Faster Payment System', '智慧銀行': 'Smart Banking', '智慧銀行新紀元': 'New Era of Smart Banking', '科技業界': 'technology business', '轉帳服務': 'fund transfer service', '金管局': 'HKMA', '金融科技': 'fintech', '銀行和科技業界': 'banking and information technology industries', '銀行帳戶': 'bank accounts', '零售快速支付系統': 'retail payment platform'}
src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The HKMA has worked closely with the banking and technology sectors, launching the "New Era of Smart Banking" in September 2017 to promote the development and innovation of fintech in Hong Kong, bringing citizens innovative payment and banking service experiences. The highlight of 2018 was undoubtedly the official launch of the Faster Payment System (FPS) in September. This is a unique retail fast payment system globally, breaking down barriers between various electronic payment tools and bank accounts in Hong Kong, allowing citizens to enjoy round-the-clock, real-time transfers in both Hong Kong dollars and Renminbi. The HKMA also simultaneously launched the world’s first common QR code standard and application, enabling merchants to connect to multiple electronic payment systems with a single QR code. Since its launch, FPS has been well received by the public, with over 2.58 million registrations in just six months, an average daily transaction volume of 60,000, and average transaction amounts of HKD 20,700 and RMB 38,000 respectively.

src_raw: 香港金融管理局是香港的中央銀行機構，主要職能有4項：在聯繫匯率制度的架構內維持貨幣穩定；促進金融體系（包括銀行體系）的穩定與健全；協助鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，包括維持與發展香港的金融基建；以及管理外匯基金。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is the central banking institution of Hong Kong. Its four main functions are: maintaining monetary stability under the Linked Exchange Rate System; promoting the stability and soundness of the financial system (including the banking system); helping to consolidate Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre, including maintaining and developing Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure; and managing the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金融管理專員的權力、職能及責任由《外匯基金條例》、《銀行業條例》、《金融機構（處置機制）條例》、《存款保障計劃條例》、《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》及其他有關條例明文規定。財政司司長與金融管理專員於2003年6月25日的互換函件，列載彼此在貨幣與金融事務方面的職能與責任的分配，亦披露財政司司長將若干權力轉授金融管理專員。有關函件為公開文件，可於金管局網站查閱。
mt_raw: The powers, functions, and responsibilities of the Monetary Authority are explicitly stipulated in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the Banking Ordinance, the Financial Institutions (Resolution) Ordinance, the Deposit Protection Scheme Ordinance, the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance, and other relevant ordinances. The exchange of letters between the Financial Secretary and the Monetary Authority on 25 June 2003 sets out the allocation of their respective functions and responsibilities in monetary and financial affairs, and also discloses the delegation of certain powers from the Financial Secretary to the Monetary Authority. These letters are public documents and can be accessed on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 外匯基金根據《外匯基金條例》設立，由財政司司長掌有控制權。該條例規定外匯基金須主要運用於影響港元匯價。財政司司長亦可運用外匯基金以保持香港貨幣金融體系的穩定與健全，藉此保持香港作為國際金融中心的地位。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is established under the Exchange Fund Ordinance and is under the control of the Financial Secretary. The Ordinance stipulates that the Exchange Fund must be used primarily to affect the exchange value of the Hong Kong dollar. The Financial Secretary may also use the Exchange Fund to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, thereby preserving Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre.

mt_raw: The HKMA is part of the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region, but may employ staff on terms different from those of civil servants in order to attract personnel with appropriate experience and expertise. The HKMA operates with a high degree of autonomy in its day-to-day operations within the statutory powers conferred or delegated to the Monetary Authority.

src_raw: 財政司司長負責釐定香港的貨幣政策目標及貨幣體制：財政司司長於2003年6月25日致金融管理專員的函件中，訂明應透過貨幣發行局制度維持貨幣穩定，將港元匯率保持在約7.80港元兌1美元的水平。金融管理專員須自行負責達成貨幣政策目標，包括決定有關的策略、工具及執行方式，並負責維持香港貨幣制度的穩定與健全。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for determining Hong Kong’s monetary policy objectives and monetary system. In a letter to the Monetary Authority dated 25 June 2003, the Financial Secretary stipulated that monetary stability should be maintained through the Currency Board System, keeping the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate at around HK$7.80 to US$1. The Monetary Authority is responsible for achieving the monetary policy objectives, including determining the relevant strategies, instruments, and means of implementation, and for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary system.

src_raw:
財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
The Financial Secretary, assisted by the Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, is responsible for policies to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s financial system and to preserve Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. To implement these policies, the responsibilities of the Monetary Authority include:
- Promoting the overall stability and effective operation of the banking system
- Cooperating with other relevant institutions and organizations to develop the debt market
- Handling matters relating to the issuance and circulation of legal tender notes and coins
- Promoting the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure through the development of payment, clearing, and settlement systems, and, where appropriate, operating such systems
- Cooperating with other relevant institutions and organizations to promote confidence in Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, and implementing appropriate market development measures to help enhance the international competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial services.

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: The HKMA is committed to achieving the highest international standards of transparency. In addition to maintaining extensive contact with the media, it publishes a range of periodicals and special publications in both Chinese and English. The HKMA’s bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) features dedicated sections on economic research, statistics, consumer information, and other topics, as well as HKMA publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials. The HKMA also utilizes social media platforms to communicate more effectively with the public in the digital age. The HKMA Information Centre, comprising a library and an exhibition area, is open to the public six days a week for visits and use. The HKMA also organizes public education activities, including seminars and guided tours at the Information Centre, to explain its work to the public (especially students) and to enhance financial literacy among citizens. For further details on the HKMA’s media relations, publications, and public education activities, please refer to the chapter on "Institutional Functions."

mt_raw: The frequency and detail of the HKMA’s disclosure of Exchange Fund and Currency Board accounts have been progressively increased. Since 1999, the HKMA has participated in the International Monetary Fund’s Special Data Dissemination Standard (SDDS) for central banks. The HKMA also publishes the minutes of the Currency Board Committee under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), as well as reports on the operation of the Currency Board System. src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: In exercising control over the Exchange Fund, the Financial Secretary seeks the advice of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC). The EFAC is established under section 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance, which stipulates that the Financial Secretary shall consult the EFAC when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary serves as the ex-officio chairman of the EFAC, while other members (including the Chief Executive of the HKMA) are appointed in their personal capacity by the Financial Secretary under the authority delegated by the Chief Executive of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region. Members are appointed for their professional knowledge and experience, which greatly benefit the EFAC. Their expertise covers areas such as monetary affairs, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, business, and law.

src_raw: 審核委員會檢討金管局的財政匯報程序，並評核其內部管控制度是否足夠和有效，以及提交報告。審核委員會負責檢視金管局的財務報表，編製該等報表的組成項目與會計原則，並聯同外部及內部審計師查核其審計範疇與結果。審核委員會各委員在金管局並沒有任何行政職能。該委員會在2018年共召開2次會議，並審議風險委員會及內部審核處的工作報告。
mt_raw: The Audit Committee reviews the financial reporting procedures of the HKMA, assesses the adequacy and effectiveness of its internal control systems, and submits reports accordingly. The Audit Committee is responsible for examining the HKMA’s financial statements, the components and accounting principles underlying those statements, and, together with external and internal auditors, reviews the scope and results of audits. Members of the Audit Committee do not hold any executive functions within the HKMA. In 2018, the Committee held two meetings and reviewed the work reports of the Risk Committee and the Internal Audit Division.

src_raw: 貨幣發行委員會監察貨幣發行局制度的運作，並匯報這個作為香港聯繫匯率制度支柱的情況。該委員會負責確保貨幣發行局制度按照既定政策運作、提出改進該制度的建議，以及確保該制度的運作維持高透明度。金管局定期公布貨幣發行委員會的會議紀錄及提交該委員會的貨幣發行局制度運作報告。該委員會在2018年共召開4次會議。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Committee oversees the operation of the Currency Board System and reports on its status as a pillar of Hong Kong’s Linked Exchange Rate System. The Committee is responsible for ensuring that the Currency Board System operates in accordance with established policies, making recommendations for improvements to the system, and ensuring that its operations maintain a high degree of transparency. The HKMA regularly publishes the minutes of the Currency Board Committee meetings and submits reports on the operation of the Currency Board System to the Committee. In 2018, the Committee held four meetings.

mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong's economy continued to expand. However, as financial conditions tightened and trade protectionism intensified, uncertainties increased, resulting in a weakening of growth momentum during the year. With global economic growth slowing, it is expected that Hong Kong's economic growth will also decelerate in 2019.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: Hong Kong's economy further expanded in 2018, but the year-on-year growth rate slowed from 4.6% in the first quarter to 1.3% in the fourth quarter (Table 1), dragging down the annual growth rate from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The weakening of economic expansion reflected a slowdown in domestic demand growth and continued drag from net exports (Figure 1). Domestically, private consumption grew strongly in the first quarter, but its momentum subsequently weakened, partly reflecting increased uncertainties due to rising trade protectionism and the wealth impairment effect brought about by asset price corrections. Owing to fragile business confidence, the overall growth of investment expenditure also slowed. Externally, goods exports remained largely stable in the first three quarters, but deteriorated significantly in the fourth quarter as Sino-US trade tensions intensified. Goods imports also slowed due to weaker demand driven by exports. In contrast, service exports recorded faster annual growth, partly benefiting from the buoyant inbound tourism industry, while service imports largely maintained growth momentum due to increases in transport, business, and other services. On a net basis, the trade balance shifted from a surplus in 2017 to a small deficit in 2018, which dragged down local economic growth.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: Mainly affected by carry trade activities under the negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, the HKD/USD exchange rate generally softened in 2018. In particular, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered in April, May, and August, prompting the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), in accordance with the Linked Exchange Rate System, to purchase Hong Kong dollars and sell US dollars at the level of HKD 7.85 to USD 1. As designed under the Linked Exchange Rate System, the Hong Kong dollar monetary base contracted, indicating a reduction in interbank liquidity. Coupled with market expectations of US interest rate hikes, the overall Hong Kong dollar interbank offered rates (HIBOR) rose. As funding costs in the banking system increased, banks raised their prime lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points in late September following the upward adjustment of the US federal funds target range. In terms of credit growth, partly due to the slowdown in local economic growth and weaker external trade performance, the overall increase in bank lending slowed significantly from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Inflationary pressure increased slightly in 2018. Excluding the effects of the government's one-off relief measures, the underlying inflation rate rose from a low of 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, though it remained moderate. Among the components, residential rent recorded a faster increase, reflecting the impact of earlier rises in newly signed private residential leases (Figure 2). A broader analysis shows that nominal labour costs and commercial property rents grew at a slightly faster pace, making local cost pressures more pronounced. As inflation rose in some of Hong Kong's major import sources, imported inflation also climbed.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: Labour market conditions remained robust in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate fell from 3.1% in 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest level since 1997. Most major service industries saw a decline in unemployment rates, with the accommodation and food services industry recording a particularly notable drop. As total employment and private sector job vacancies further increased, overall labour demand continued to strengthen, and the labour force participation rate also edged up. With the labour market remaining tight, real wages and incomes further increased.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong stock market experienced a sharp reversal in 2018. Driven by strong upward momentum in 2017, the Hang Seng Index reached a historic high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, as major central banks tightened monetary policy, Sino-US trade tensions intensified, and concerns grew over the slowdown in local economic growth, market sentiment reversed sharply. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 points in October and closed at 25,846 points at year-end, down 13.6% from a year earlier. Nevertheless, the average daily turnover rose from HKD 88.2 billion in 2017 to HKD 107.4 billion, and total funds raised through initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong increased significantly due to the listing of several companies engaged in emerging and innovation and technology industries.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained buoyant in the first half of 2018. However, it cooled in the second half of the year as Sino-US trade tensions intensified, global stock markets adjusted, and Hong Kong’s prime lending rate increased. Overall property prices fell by 9% from their peak between July and December, yet for the year as a whole, they still recorded a 2% increase (Figure 4). As trading activity in both the primary and secondary markets declined significantly in the second half, the total number of property transactions in 2018 dropped by 7% from the previous year to 57,247 cases. In addition, housing affordability remained tight, with the price-to-income ratio and income leverage ratio at 17.0 and 75.7, respectively—both far above their long-term averages. On the other hand, non-residential property prices rose overall in 2018, though they saw a slight correction towards the end of the year. mt_raw: With the slowdown in global economic growth, Hong Kong’s economic growth is expected to moderate in 2019. Regarding fixed capital formation, while building and construction activity should grow steadily as housing supply increases, heightened economic uncertainties may prompt businesses to become more cautious about capital investment. The government forecasts real GDP growth for 2019 to be between 2% and 3%, while the latest forecasts by private sector analysts average 2.3%.

mt_raw: The banking system continued to grow steadily in 2018, with the balance sheet expanding by 5.9%. Amid persistent economic uncertainties—such as trade conflicts among major economies and interest rate hikes—corporates became more cautious in obtaining new loans. src_raw: 就負債方而言，存款總額在2018年增加5%，較2017年（+8.7%）的增幅小。由於預期美國持續加息，部分銀行上調定期存款利率，吸引存戶將往來及儲蓄存款轉為定期存款，從而鎖定資金。往來及儲蓄存款佔存款總額的比例由對上一年的57.4%，降至2018年底的51.4%，導致資金成本上升。由於存款總額的增長較貸款總額快，整體貸存比率由2017年底的73%稍降至2018年底的72.6%（圖5）。

The proportion of current and savings deposits to total deposits fell from 57.4% in the previous year to 51.4% at end-2018, resulting in higher funding costs. As total deposits grew faster than total loans, the overall loan-to-deposit ratio edged down from 73% at end-2017 to 72.6% at end-2018 (Figure 5).

src_raw: 2018年港元利率普遍上升，而港元現貨匯率則回軟，並貼近弱方兌換保證匯率的水平。儘管如此，港元外匯及貨幣市場運作仍然暢順有序。聯繫匯率制度是香港貨幣及金融穩定的基石，並繼續展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。
mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong dollar interest rates generally rose, while the spot exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar weakened and hovered near the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level. Nevertheless, the operation of the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange and money market remained smooth and orderly. The Linked Exchange Rate System is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability and continues to demonstrate its ability to withstand significant shocks.

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: The primary objective of Hong Kong’s monetary policy is to maintain currency stability, that is, to ensure the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate, keeping the rate within the range of HK$7.75 to HK$7.85 per US dollar in the foreign exchange market. This monetary system mainly adopts the Currency Board System, which requires that the US dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund provide at least 100% backing for the monetary base; any change in the monetary base must be matched by a corresponding change in US dollar reserves, maintaining a 100% match with the monetary base.

- Certificates of Indebtedness (which provide full backing for banknotes issued by the three note-issuing banks)
- Government-issued notes and coins

- Exchange Fund Bills and Notes issued by the HKMA on behalf of the government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate through the automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to fulfilling the convertibility undertaking. If market demand for Hong Kong dollars exceeds supply, causing the market exchange rate to strengthen to the strong-side Convertibility Undertaking level of HK$7.75 per US dollar, the HKMA will sell Hong Kong dollars and buy US dollars from banks, increasing the aggregate balance and lowering Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thereby bringing the exchange rate back within the HK$7.75 to HK$7.85 range. Conversely, if there is an oversupply of Hong Kong dollars, causing the market exchange rate to weaken to the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level of HK$7.85 per US dollar, the HKMA will buy Hong Kong dollars from banks, reducing the aggregate balance and pushing up Hong Kong dollar interest rates, thus returning the exchange rate from the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level to within the target range.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Against the backdrop of a widening negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, which spurred carry trade activities, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate gradually weakened from the beginning of the year. On April 12, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered for the first time since it was set at the 7.85 level in 2005. Over the year, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered a total of 27 times in 2018—13 times in April, 6 times in May, and 8 times in August. Nevertheless, Hong Kong dollar trading remained smooth and orderly, with the exchange rate hovering near the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level of 7.85 from mid-April to mid-September (Figure 1). Subsequently, the Hong Kong dollar exchange rate strengthened slightly, partly reflecting the approach of holidays, quarter-end, and year-end, which tightened interbank liquidity and led to the unwinding of some carry trades. At the same time, the Hong Kong dollar was also supported to some extent by improved stock market sentiment in early November. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: As the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered, the aggregate balance and the outstanding amount of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes decreased from HK$1,226.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HK$1,136.2 billion at the end of 2018 (Figure 2). During the year, in accordance with the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the HKMA, at the request of banks, purchased a total of HK$103.5 billion at the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking level of 7.85, resulting in the aggregate balance falling from HK$179.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HK$76.4 billion at the end of 2018. The outstanding amount of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes remained largely unchanged during the year. The monetary base continued to be fully backed by foreign exchange reserves.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Following the triggering of the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking, interbank liquidity decreased, and with market expectations of US interest rate hikes, Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates generally rose in 2018. Driven by increased funding demand related to IPO activities and seasonal liquidity needs, short-term Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates experienced greater volatility (Figure 3). Overall, short-term Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates remained below the Base Rate throughout 2018. Given the rising funding costs in the banking system, banks raised their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points after the US Federal Funds Rate target range was increased in late September.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: In response to four increases in the US Federal Funds Rate target range during the year, totaling 100 basis points—from 1.25–1.50% to 2.25–2.50%—the Base Rate was raised by a total of 100 basis points on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20, from 1.75% to 2.75%. Adjustments to the Base Rate were made in accordance with the revised formula announced on March 26, 2009. Under this formula, the Base Rate is set at either 50 basis points above the lower end of the US Federal Funds Rate target range or the average of the five-day moving averages of the overnight and one-month Hong Kong Interbank Offered Rates, whichever is higher.

src_raw: 港元遠期匯率折讓在首4個月擴大，大致跟隨港元與美元息差的走勢，其中12個月港元遠期匯率點子在4月中達到負620點子（圖4）。其後隨着港元與美元的負息差收窄，港元遠期匯率折讓略為縮小，然後在第4季再度擴大。整體而言，香港貨幣市場繼續正常運作。貼現窗借貸由2017年的103億港元增至2018年的402億港元。
mt_raw: The forward discount of the Hong Kong dollar (HKD) widened during the first four months, broadly following the trend of the interest rate differential between the HKD and the US dollar (USD). In particular, the 12-month HKD forward points reached -620 points in mid-April (see Figure 4). Subsequently, as the negative interest rate differential between the HKD and USD narrowed, the HKD forward discount contracted slightly, before widening again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong money market continued to operate normally. Discount window borrowing increased from HKD 10.3 billion in 2017 to HKD 40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: Since its implementation in 1983, the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS) has remained a cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability, demonstrating its ability to withstand significant shocks during various regional and global financial crises. Due to the weakening of the HKD, the Weak-side Convertibility Undertaking, which is part of the LERS design, was triggered multiple times in April, May, and August. Capital outflows from the HKD are an inevitable process in the normalization of Hong Kong’s interest rates and represent normal operations under the LERS. To enhance public understanding of these operations and the mechanisms of the LERS, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is committed to explaining the technical details of the LERS to the public and demonstrating the Hong Kong financial system’s ability to withstand shocks. The government remains firmly committed to maintaining the LERS. The foreign exchange and money markets have remained stable, further strengthening public confidence in the government’s commitment and in the HKD as a means of payment and store of value. During the 2018 Article IV Consultation with Hong Kong, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) reiterated its support for the LERS, noting that it remains the most suitable monetary system for Hong Kong, serving as a pillar of stability that helps ensure sustained economic growth, maintain competitiveness, and facilitate the smooth operation of the large financial services industry.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: Given that a sound banking system is crucial to the normal operation of the LERS, the HKMA continues to closely monitor banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as the results of stress tests, and maintains supervision over banks’ corporate, property-related, and Mainland-related lending to ensure the banking system’s ability to withstand shocks. Banks hold substantial amounts of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes, which can be used at the discount window to obtain HKD liquidity, providing an effective buffer against significant interest rate fluctuations. The HKMA stands ready to provide additional liquidity by adjusting the issuance volume of Exchange Fund Bills and Notes to address the possibility of a sudden outflow of funds from the HKD. The HKMA also reminds the public to prudently manage market and interest rate risks and to prepare for possible market volatility.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: To enhance the transparency of the Currency Board accounts, since October 1998, a portion of the Exchange Fund’s assets has been designated as backing for the monetary base. The backing ratio (i.e., the ratio of backing assets to the monetary base) fluctuated between 107.8% and 109.9% in 2018, without reaching either the upper or lower limits. As of 31 December, the ratio stood at 109.9% (see Figure 5). Under the LERS, although certain Exchange Fund assets have been designated as the backing portfolio, all assets of the Exchange Fund can be used to support the HKD exchange rate. The substantial fiscal resources of the Exchange Fund provide a strong safeguard for Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability in the face of unexpected shocks.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Board Sub-Committee (CBC) under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2018, topics discussed by the CBC included the potential impact of the joint exit of multiple central banks from unconventional monetary policy on the supply of offshore USD loans in Hong Kong, the interest rate sensitivity of HKD currency demand, and the operational mechanisms and theories of the LERS since the implementation of three optimization measures. The minutes of CBC meetings and the reports on the operation of the Currency Board System submitted by the HKMA are available on the HKMA website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary and Financial Research (the Research Centre) continues to support research in the areas of monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the Research Centre has placed greater emphasis on policy-oriented research, as evidenced by the seminars and visiting scholar programmes it has organized. On one hand, the Research Centre has collaborated with major central banks and policy research institutions to jointly organize more policy-related seminars. On the other hand, the Thematic Research Fellowship Scheme, launched in 2016, supports more research projects relevant to HKMA policy formulation.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the Financial Research Centre invited a total of 16 research scholars for visits and published 25 research papers. During the year, the Centre also organized four international conferences:
- The "9th Annual International Conference on the Chinese Economy" held in January, with the theme "China's Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability." The conference was co-organized by the Financial Research Centre, the Institute of Market Economy of the Development Research Center of the State Council, and the Financial Research Institute of the People's Bank of China, focusing on issues and risks related to the Mainland real estate market.
- The "Exchange Rate and Monetary Policy Framework" conference held in October, co-organized by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) and the Bank for International Settlements (BIS). This conference was one of the events celebrating the 20th anniversary of the BIS Asia-Pacific Office in Hong Kong, and aimed to explore the role of exchange rates within monetary policy frameworks.
- The "2018 Annual Conference on Central Bank Market Microstructure" held in November. The conference discussed theoretical and empirical research on market microstructure, as well as the policy implications of recent developments.
- The "A New Era for China's Economy" China Expert Network conference, held in November and co-organized by the HKMA, the European Central Bank (ECB), and the Federal Reserve Board (Fed). The conference addressed pressing issues facing the Mainland economy and their impact on the global economy, with particular emphasis on policy issues relevant to central bank decision-makers. This was the first time the China Expert Network conference was held outside Europe.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increased uncertainties in the global economy and financial markets, Hong Kong's banking system remained robust in 2018. The effectiveness of authorized institutions’ liquidity and credit risk management systems continued to be a supervisory focus of the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) during the year. In view of the persistent rise in cyber threats and the broader adoption of fintech in the banking sector, the HKMA strengthened its supervision of authorized institutions’ technology risk management and business operation recovery capability. In May, the HKMA also issued a revised version of the Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks and began processing applications for virtual bank authorization. In terms of conduct supervision, the HKMA took further measures to enhance the regulation of authorized institutions’ sales practices for investment and insurance products, promote accessible banking services for persons with disabilities, and foster a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crime becomes increasingly complex and globalized, the HKMA continues to leverage new technologies and a risk-based approach to strengthen Hong Kong’s anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing regime. The HKMA made good progress in implementing international regulatory standards in Hong Kong, including capital adequacy standards, disclosure standards, liquidity standards, and large exposure limits. In addition, the HKMA enhanced communication and engagement with the banking sector to ensure an appropriate balance between regulatory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 金管局的整體目標之一是促進銀行體系的安全及穩定。要達致這個目標，實有賴建立及維持具高度應對能力且能為香港經濟提供所需關鍵金融服務的金融體系。
mt_raw: One of the HKMA’s overall objectives is to promote the safety and stability of the banking system. Achieving this objective relies on establishing and maintaining a highly resilient financial system capable of providing the critical financial services required by Hong Kong’s economy.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。
mt_raw: Banks may, due to their mode of operation or, in extreme cases, due to disorderly failure, affect the stability of the banking system. As the regulatory authority, the Monetary Authority plays a vital role in safeguarding financial stability by ensuring that banks are able to withstand shocks, respond to crises, and recover to normal from crises, ultimately helping to prevent failures. The Monetary Authority is responsible for the prudential supervision of banks and for authorizing licensed banks, restricted licence banks, and deposit-taking companies in Hong Kong (collectively referred to as "authorized institutions"). The Monetary Authority is also responsible for the designation and supervision of certain financial market infrastructures.

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。
mt_raw: However, the Monetary Authority cannot ensure that the financial system is entirely risk-free, nor is Hong Kong’s prudential supervisory regime designed to achieve "zero risk." As one of the resolution authorities, the Monetary Authority seeks to ensure that, should an authorized institution become no longer viable, its failure can be handled in an orderly manner. To this end, Hong Kong has established a resolution regime for financial institutions, under which the Monetary Authority acts as the resolution authority for certain financial institutions, including authorized institutions. To establish a smoothly functioning resolution regime in Hong Kong, it is necessary to develop resolution legislation and policy standards, conduct resolution planning to remove obstacles to the resolvability of authorized institutions, and build the HKMA’s operational capability to resolve non-viable authorized institutions. To effectively carry out these tasks, the HKMA needs to adopt approaches that are consistent and coordinated with international standards.

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the HKMA conducted a total of 187 off-site reviews, covering a wide range of areas including CAMEL ratings of authorized institutions, corporate governance, business operations and risk management, as well as business strategies in response to fintech developments. To further strengthen the risk governance of authorized institutions, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards or board committees of authorized institutions and followed up on the implementation of corporate governance guidelines. In addition, the HKMA held 28 tripartite meetings with authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site reviews, the HKMA continued to conduct regular on-site examinations, supplemented by thematic assessments focusing on higher-risk areas. During the year, the HKMA conducted a total of 392 on-site examinations and thematic assessments, with credit risk management remaining the primary focus of these reviews and assessments. Other key areas included technology risk and operational risk management, as well as anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing controls. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site examinations and thematic assessments targeting liquidity and market risk management, as well as the implementation of the Basel capital adequacy framework. Dedicated review teams also conducted on-site examinations of authorized institutions’ businesses related to securities, investment products, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) products.

src_raw: 認可機構的資產質素在2018年維持穩健。零售銀行的特定分類貸款比率由2017年底的0.56%下降至2018年底的0.50%，遠低於2000年以來的長期平均水平2.1%；同期，整體銀行業的特定分類貸款比率則由0.68%下降至0.55%。內地相關貸款方面，零售銀行的特定分類貸款比率由0.75%下降至2018年的0.63%，整體銀行業的相關比率亦由一年前的0.67%下降至0.54%。
mt_raw: The asset quality of authorized institutions remained robust in 2018. The classified loan ratio of retail banks decreased from 0.56% at the end of 2017 to 0.50% at the end of 2018, which is significantly lower than the long-term average of 2.1% since 2000. Over the same period, the classified loan ratio for the overall banking sector fell from 0.68% to 0.55%. Regarding Mainland-related lending, the classified loan ratio of retail banks dropped from 0.75% to 0.63% in 2018, while the corresponding ratio for the overall banking sector declined from 0.67% a year earlier to 0.54%.

src_raw: 年內金管局加強監管，確保認可機構繼續採取審慎的信用風險管理準則。尤其金管局更主動了解大型企業的背景及結構，從而加強企業信用風險的監察制度。此外，金管局亦進行以主要信用風險管理監控措施為重點的專題評估，例如大型企業貸款的批核準則及風險管理、貸款分類及撥備制度、信用風險管治架構、地產發展商貸款的風險管理、有抵押貸款及保單抵押貸款等。
mt_raw: During the year, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) strengthened its supervision to ensure that authorized institutions continued to adopt prudent credit risk management standards. In particular, the HKMA proactively sought to understand the background and structure of large corporations to enhance the corporate credit risk monitoring system. In addition, the HKMA conducted thematic assessments focusing on key credit risk management and control measures, such as approval criteria and risk management for large corporate loans, loan classification and provisioning systems, credit risk governance frameworks, risk management for property developer loans, secured loans, and policy loans.

src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices reached a historical peak in July 2018 but showed signs of moderation in the second half of the year. Since October 2009, the HKMA has introduced eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures, which have strengthened the resilience of Hong Kong’s banking system against potential reversals in the local property market. The average loan-to-value ratio of new residential mortgage loans decreased from 64% before the first round of countercyclical measures in September 2009 to 46% in December 2018. The average debt servicing ratio also fell from 41% when the relevant cap was first introduced in August 2010 to 34% in December 2018 (see Figure 1).

src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: Technology risk in the banking sector remained elevated. In 2016, the HKMA launched the Cybersecurity Fortification Initiative (CFI). The first phase covered 30 authorized institutions, including all major banks, which have completed three stages of assessment: self-assessment of risk level, maturity assessment, and, where applicable, threat intelligence-led cyber attack simulation testing. These assessments help authorized institutions identify areas for improvement and implement remedial measures to strengthen cyber defense. Meanwhile, the HKMA has established timelines for the second and third phases, which will cover the remaining authorized institutions. During the year, the HKMA conducted on-site examinations focusing on the cyber security controls, outsourcing arrangements, and IT governance of authorized institutions.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continued to collaborate with the banking sector on the seven initiatives announced in September 2017 to promote Smart Banking and the development of fintech in Hong Kong. On the regulatory front, the HKMA issued a revised version of the "Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks" in May. In addition, under the "Banking Made Easy" initiative, the HKMA has streamlined regulatory requirements for remote account opening, online lending, and online wealth management. These enhanced regulatory requirements help banks provide a better online banking user experience. In September, the scope of the "Banking Made Easy" initiative was expanded to promote the adoption of regulatory technology (Regtech) by banks, with three new areas of focus: AML/CFT surveillance technology, Regtech for prudential risk management and compliance, and "machine-readable" regulatory requirements.

src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong government’s "Hong Kong Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment Report" published in April indicated that the Hong Kong banking system faces a high money laundering threat, similar to other international financial centers, reflecting the increasing globalization and complexity of financial services. The money laundering threats faced by Hong Kong arise not only from local criminal activities but, to a greater extent, from overseas activities. These include illicit proceeds from overseas corruption, fraud by transnational criminal syndicates, tax evasion, and sanctions-related risks arising from Hong Kong’s role as a payment and trade hub. With the assistance of the HKMA, the government formulated an AML/CFT policy statement outlining responses to these threats, aiming to enhance the effectiveness of the AML/CFT regime while attracting and facilitating legitimate businesses.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The "2018 Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Financial Institutions) (Amendment) Ordinance" came into effect on March 1, introducing amendments that provide flexibility in customer identity verification, thereby facilitating authorized institutions in leveraging technology to make account opening more convenient for customers. The new legislation also expands its scope of application, requiring lawyers, accountants, estate agents, and trust or company service providers to assume responsibilities for anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing, thereby comprehensively strengthening the anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing regime. These amendments, together with those made to the Companies Ordinance to enhance the transparency of corporate beneficial ownership, assist authorized institutions in carrying out their anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing work.

mt_raw: To consolidate and further strengthen communication with authorized institutions regarding anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing policies and supervisory approaches, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) issued a new module under the Supervisory Policy Manual in October, entitled "Supervisory Approach to Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism," along with the revised "Guideline on Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Financing of Terrorism (For Authorized Institutions)" to align with the relevant legislative amendments. src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: With the implementation of optimization measures for the mutual market access schemes between Mainland China and Hong Kong, Hong Kong’s unique position as the main gateway to Mainland China has been further strengthened. "Bond Connect" has fully implemented the Delivery versus Payment (DvP) settlement model, and the State Council has announced tax exemption arrangements for overseas investors investing in the onshore bond market, further enhancing the efficiency and attractiveness of the scheme. The HKMA has also worked closely with Mainland authorities to explore and implement a number of financial support measures to facilitate individuals and enterprises living, working, and doing business in the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area (GBA). Hong Kong’s offshore RMB business continues to flourish, with the RMB deposit pool rising by 6% over the year to RMB 657.7 billion; the average daily turnover of the RMB Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system reached a high level of RMB 1,010.1 billion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The HKMA is actively seeking new opportunities to further enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To promote the development of Hong Kong’s bond market, the HKMA has implemented the "Pilot Bond Grant Scheme" proposed in the Budget, providing subsidies to institutions issuing bonds in Hong Kong for the first time, and is working closely with the government to amend legislation to expand the scope of bond investment income eligible for tax exemption under the "Qualifying Debt Instrument Scheme". The HKMA has also strengthened market promotion activities, publicizing Hong Kong’s advantages to overseas and Mainland stakeholders, including organizing a number of large-scale and thematic outreach events to promote Hong Kong as a hub for green finance, infrastructure financing, and corporate treasury centres.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The safe and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure lays a solid foundation for Hong Kong as an international financial centre. The four RTGS systems for interbank transactions, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU) system for debt instruments, and the Hong Kong Trade Repository all achieved 100% system availability in 2018, exceeding the target level of 99.95%. Through accounts with the two Mainland central securities depositories, the CMU system continues to facilitate settlement of Northbound Bond Connect transactions and holds Mainland debt securities for relevant CMU system members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To promote the overall safety and efficiency of the retail payment industry, the HKMA designated two additional retail payment systems under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (the "Payment Ordinance") in August, bringing them under HKMA supervision. The number of designated retail payment systems under HKMA supervision has now increased to six. The HKMA also regulates 16 stored value facility licensees. These licensees have actively launched new products and services, striving to provide customers with more choices and a better user experience. At the same time, the scope of e-cheque and e-bill payment services has been further expanded to cover cross-border payment transactions between Hong Kong and the entire Guangdong Province.

mt_raw: The Faster Payment System (FPS) was successfully launched in September, enabling bank and stored value facility (SVF) users to transfer funds in Hong Kong dollars and Renminbi across banks instantly, anytime and anywhere, by simply entering the recipient’s mobile phone number or email address. src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: Open API refers to the practice of opening up relevant bank data to third-party service providers, enabling better and more convenient integration of banking and other industry services. Users can enjoy integrated services in a secure environment through a single system. To promote the development and provision of Open API by the banking sector, the HKMA released the Open API Framework in July. The framework adopts a risk-based approach and implements various Open API functions in four phases. As of the end of January 2019, 20 banks had opened approximately 500 Open API endpoints in the first phase, covering information on over 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: Building on the proof-of-concept results led by the HKMA in trade finance, a consortium of several Hong Kong banks launched the distributed ledger technology (DLT)-based trade finance platform "eTradeConnect" in October. The platform aims to reduce errors and fraud risks by digitizing trade documents and automating trade finance processes. By the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined the consortium. In October, eTradeConnect and the European trade finance platform "we.trade" signed a Memorandum of Understanding to conduct a proof of concept for interfacing the two platforms. The HKMA is also exploring opportunities for eTradeConnect to interface with other regions, including collaborating with the Monetary Authority of Singapore to launch the Global Trade Connectivity Network (GTCN).

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a challenging year for investors, as the investment environment was plagued by multiple risk factors. These included the continued normalization of US interest rates leading to tighter financial conditions, escalating trade frictions among major economies, as well as the rise of populism and heightened geopolitical risks in various parts of the world. Global equity markets generally trended downward, and US Treasury yields rose in tandem with four interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. As US interest rates increased, the US dollar strengthened. Some emerging markets, facing severe domestic political and economic pressures, experienced significant currency depreciation. Despite the challenging investment environment, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$10.9 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 根據《外匯基金條例》，外匯基金的首要目的是直接或間接影響港元匯價，亦可運用於保持香港貨幣及金融體系穩定健全，藉此保持香港作為國際金融中心的地位。金管局根據財政司司長轉授的權力及轉授權力的條款，就外匯基金的運用及投資管理向財政司司長負責。
mt_raw: According to the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the primary objective of the Exchange Fund is to affect, either directly or indirectly, the exchange rate of the Hong Kong dollar. It may also be used to maintain the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems, thereby preserving Hong Kong’s status as an international financial centre. The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), under the powers delegated by the Financial Secretary and the terms of such delegation, is responsible to the Financial Secretary for the use and investment management of the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: The Exchange Fund is broadly divided into two main portfolios: the Backing Portfolio and the Investment Portfolio. The Backing Portfolio holds highly liquid US dollar assets to provide full backing for the monetary base in accordance with the requirements of the Currency Board System. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in the bond and equity markets of member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD), with the aim of preserving asset value and long-term purchasing power.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risk and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA has prudently and gradually diversified part of the Exchange Fund’s assets into a broader range of asset classes, including emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities, private equity (including infrastructure), and real estate. Emerging market and Mainland bonds and equities are held under the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are held under the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The market value cap of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio is set at one-third of the accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund, plus the sum of the portions of the Future Fund and Exchange Fund subsidiary deposits linked to the Long-Term Growth Portfolio.

terms: {'外匯基金': 'Exchange Fund', '循跡誤差': 'tracking error', '戰略性偏離': 'tactical deviations', '戰略性資產配置': 'tactical asset allocation', '投資基準': 'investment benchmark', '投資程序': 'investment process', '投資組合經理': 'portfolio managers', '策略性資產配置': 'strategic asset allocation', '金管局': 'HKMA'}
src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment process of the Exchange Fund is based on both strategic asset allocation and tactical asset allocation. Strategic asset allocation, as reflected in the investment benchmark, represents the long-term asset allocation that the Exchange Fund may adopt to achieve its investment objectives. Guided by the strategic allocation, the Exchange Fund undertakes tactical allocation to seek returns in excess of the benchmark. As a result, the actual allocation often deviates from the benchmark (i.e., the strategic allocation), and the difference between the actual and benchmark allocations is referred to as the "tactical deviation." The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmark and tracking error limit. The HKMA is authorized to determine the tactical asset allocation and set the permissible range for tactical deviation. Portfolio managers may select positions within the permissible range of tactical deviation to profit from short-term market movements.

src_raw: 金管局於8月成立外匯基金投資辦公室，專責投資及相關風險管理職能。該辦公室職員負責直接管理外匯基金約72%的投資，包括整個支持組合及部分投資組合。該部分的投資組合投資於環球定息市場，並透過衍生工具執行外匯基金的宏觀風險管理策略。
mt_raw: In August, the HKMA established the Exchange Fund Investment Office, which is responsible for investment and related risk management functions. Staff of this office directly manage approximately 72% of the Exchange Fund’s investments, including the entire Backing Portfolio and part of the Investment Portfolio. This portion of the Investment Portfolio is invested in global fixed income markets, and macro risk management strategies for the Exchange Fund are implemented through derivatives.

mt_raw: In addition to managing assets internally, the HKMA also employs external fund managers to manage approximately 28% of the Exchange Fund’s assets, including all listed equity portfolios and other special assets. src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，突顯風險管理的重要。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂立嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並密切監察對指引及法規的遵守情況。金管局已加強風險評估，以配合外匯基金越趨多元化的投資；另採用風險管控工具來評估在正常及極度不利市況下的市場風險。金管局亦進行詳細的投資表現因素分析，以識別促成不同表現的成因，藉此評估如何充分利用內部及外聘投資經理的投資管理技術。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, the importance of risk management is further underscored. The HKMA has established stringent control measures and investment guidelines for portfolios managed by both internal and external investment managers, and closely monitors compliance with these guidelines and regulations. The HKMA has enhanced risk assessment to accommodate the increasingly diversified investments of the Exchange Fund; in addition, risk control tools are employed to assess market risk under both normal and extremely adverse market conditions. The HKMA also conducts detailed performance attribution analysis to identify the factors contributing to different investment outcomes, thereby evaluating how best to leverage the investment management expertise of both internal and external managers.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA supports responsible investment. For example, the HKMA has adopted the Principles of Responsible Ownership promulgated by the Securities and Futures Commission. These principles are designed to assist investors in determining how best to fulfill their ownership responsibilities in investments in Hong Kong-listed companies. In managing the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has established internal guidelines on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors, which apply to the selection, appointment, and monitoring procedures for external fund managers. External fund managers appointed to actively manage Hong Kong equity portfolios are required to comply with the Principles of Responsible Ownership in managing the relevant investments. Overall, the HKMA has incorporated ESG factors into its internal procedures for investment and related monitoring activities. The HKMA will closely monitor the development of standards related to ESG factors and assess how these standards can be further integrated into investment processes. In addition, to promote international cooperation in responsible investment, the HKMA has become a member of FCLTGlobal, a non-profit organization dedicated to promoting long-term oriented business and investment decisions.

src_raw: 在2018年，原先被市場低估的多項風險因素一一浮現，包括美國利率正常化的步伐、美國政府外貿政策和保護主義對全球貿易的衝擊，以及地緣政治的風險，環球金融市場因而出現大幅波動及調整。
mt_raw: In 2018, a number of risk factors that had previously been underestimated by the market emerged, including the pace of US interest rate normalization, the impact of US government trade policy and protectionism on global trade, and geopolitical risks. As a result, global financial markets experienced significant volatility and correction.

src_raw: 中美貿易爭議升級，令投資者非常憂慮，新興市場及香港股市自1月底開始反覆下跌，恒生指數自該月份的高位最多下跌27%。自第4季起，主要歐美股市亦大幅下滑，錄得雙位數字跌幅。就2018年整體而言，全球股市普遍下跌，涵蓋已發展國家股市的MSCI全球指數下跌10.4%，MSCI新興市場指數亦下跌16.6%。
mt_raw: The escalation of Sino-US trade disputes caused considerable concern among investors. Emerging markets and the Hong Kong stock market experienced repeated declines starting from the end of January, with the Hang Seng Index falling by as much as 27% from its peak that month. From the fourth quarter onwards, major stock markets in Europe and the US also saw substantial declines, recording double-digit losses. For 2018 as a whole, global equity markets generally fell, with the MSCI World Index, which covers developed markets, down 10.4%, and the MSCI Emerging Markets Index down 16.6%.

src_raw: 債市方面，由於美國貨幣政策正常化，美國國庫券收益率於2018年大致向上。然而，年內債市仍有波動。例如10年期美國國庫券收益率由年初約2.5%上升至11月3.2%的7年新高，但至年底時受投資者憂慮中美貿易爭議及趨向避險投資所影響而回軟至2.7%。
mt_raw: In the bond market, US Treasury yields generally trended upward in 2018 due to the normalization of US monetary policy. Nevertheless, the bond market remained volatile during the year. For example, the yield on 10-year US Treasuries rose from about 2.5% at the beginning of the year to a seven-year high of 3.2% in November, but eased back to 2.7% by year-end as concerns over Sino-US trade disputes and a shift towards safe-haven investments took hold.

terms: {'加息': 'interest rate hikes', '新興市場': 'emerging market', '美匯指數': 'US dollar index', '美國加息': 'US interest rate hikes', '避險投資': 'safe haven assets'}
src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，年內美元跟隨美國加息轉強。美匯指數上升4.4%，歐元及人民幣等主要貨幣兌美元下跌約5%。此外，部分新興市場受到國內政局及經濟不穩影響，其貨幣進一步受挫。例如，阿根廷披索及土耳其里拉兌美元分別下跌約五成及三成。相比之下，避險投資需求帶動日圓兌美元上升2.7%。
mt_raw: In the currency market, the US dollar strengthened during the year in line with US interest rate hikes. The US Dollar Index rose by 4.4%, while major currencies such as the euro and the renminbi depreciated by about 5% against the US dollar. In addition, some emerging markets were further affected by domestic political and economic instability, leading to further currency depreciation. For example, the Argentine peso and Turkish lira depreciated by about 50% and 30% against the US dollar, respectively. By contrast, demand for safe-haven investments drove the Japanese yen up by 2.7% against the US dollar.

src_raw: 金管局的機構網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)提供超過6萬頁英文及繁簡字體中文版資料，方便公眾查閱金管局的最新資訊。網站另載有根據《銀行業條例》第20條備存的「認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊」和「認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊」，以及根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》備存的「儲值支付工具持牌人紀錄冊」。網站特設專題網頁及突出的快速連結，提醒公眾注意金管局的新措施，例如「轉數快」，以及重要及適時事項，例如提防電話騙案及硬幣收集計劃下收銀車停泊的位置。
mt_raw: The HKMA website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in English and both traditional and simplified Chinese, making it convenient for the public to access the latest information about the HKMA. The website also contains the Register of Authorized Institutions and Local Representative Offices and the Register of Securities Business Staff of Authorized Institutions, maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the Register of Stored Value Facility Licensees maintained under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. The website features dedicated pages and prominent quick links to alert the public to new HKMA initiatives, such as the Faster Payment System (FPS), and to important and timely matters, such as warnings against phone scams and the locations of coin collection vehicles under the coin collection programme.
